_publications._publicationTitle: The Combination of HSP90 Inhibitors and Selumetinib Reinforces the Inhibitory Effects on Plexiform Neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: Utilizing the SynergyPlus web tool, we calculated the Bliss synergy score based on the viabilities of the cell lines treated with the combination matrix. The synergistic effect score cutoff defined by the SynergyPlus algorithm is that the mean synergy score should be more than 10
details: Successfully calculated Bliss synergy scores with cutoff of mean synergy score >10, confirming synergistic effects between selumetinib and HSP90i in NF1-deficient cell models
